zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh.於1480年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥時，他的父親Sir Roger Anderson40歲，母親Jane Lockwood36歲。他於1499年與Lady Magdalen Margaret Smythe在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1557年10月18日在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安馮 音其享年77歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安馮 音其。

nameMeanings.name: Anderson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern English: patronymic from the personal name Ander(s), a northern Middle English form of Andrew , + son ‘son’. The frequency of the surname in Scotland is attributable, at least in part, to the fact that Saint Andrew is the patron saint of Scotland, so the personal name has long enjoyed great popularity there. Legend has it that the saint's relics were taken to Scotland in the 4th century by a certain Saint Regulus. In North America, this surname has absorbed many cognate or like-sounding surnames in other languages, notably Scandinavian (see 3 and 4 below), but also Ukrainian Andreychenko etc.
German: patronymic from the personal name   Anders  , hence a cognate of 1 above.
Americanized form (and a less common Swedish variant) of Swedish   Andersson  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

nameMeanings.name: Edmond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Edmund  , now in quite frequent use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh. was born in 1480, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Roger Anderson, was 40 and his mother, Jane Lockwood, was 36. He married Lady Magdalen Margaret Smythe in 1499, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 18 October 1557, in The Inch, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 77, and was buried in The Inch, Midlothian, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh. est né en 1480, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Roger Anderson, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Jane Lockwood, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Lady Magdalen Margaret Smythe en 1499, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 18 octobre 1557, à The Inch, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à The Inch, Midlothian, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh. 1480 in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger Anderson 40 und seine Mutter Jane Lockwood 36. Er hat 1499 in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Magdalen Margaret Smythe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Oktober 1557 im Alter von 77 Jahren in The Inch, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in The Inch, Midlothian, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh. è nato il nel 1480 nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Roger Anderson, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Jane Lockwood, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Lady Magdalen Margaret Smythe nel 1499, nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 18 ottobre 1557, nel The Inch, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a The Inch, Midlothian, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh.が1480年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Andersonは40歳，母Jane Lockwoodは36歳であった。1499年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウでLady Magdalen Margaret Smytheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1557年10月18日にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンス インチで77歳で死去し，スコットランドミドロスアンス インチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh.(이)가 1480년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger Anderson(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Lockwood(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1499년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 Lady Magdalen Margaret Smythe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1557년 10월 18일 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 테 인치에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 테 인치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh. nasceu em 1480, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Roger Anderson, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Jane Lockwood, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Magdalen Margaret Smythe em 1499, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1557, em The Inch, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em The Inch, Midlothian, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Edmond Anderson Provost of Edinburgh. родился в 1480 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Roger Anderson было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Lockwood, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Magdalen Margaret Smythe в 1499 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 18 октября 1557 г. в местности т инч, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности т инч, мидлотян, Шотландия.

Se casó con Lady Magdalen Margaret Smythe en 1499, en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1557, en The Inch, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en The Inch, Midlothian, Scotland.
